← Back to demos

Toast Engine

A headless toast engine: it owns the queue, timers, stacking order, position grouping, overflow and lifecycle, and emits state. Every pixel below is rendered by the demo consumer (toast-engine/toast-engine.demo.js) from that state — the engine ships no DOM and no CSS.

Fire a toast

Engine configuration

Hover a toast to freeze its timer and progress bar (remaining time is preserved on leave). Switch to another browser tab mid-toast and back — the timer pauses while hidden. Toggle OS “Reduce motion” to see animations skipped while removal stays prompt (reduced motion: off). Changing order/overflow/max/hover rebuilds the toaster.
